temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A close-up shot shows a woman with brown hair and blue eyes. Her expression is one of concern and apprehension as she looks slightly off-camera. Her lips are slightly parted as if she is about to speak or is in the middle of speaking. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and emotional atmosphere, focusing on the woman's worried expression, which sets a suspenseful mood.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Worried, confused. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint, indistinct background noise.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene abruptly cuts to a dark, gruesome close-up of a person's hand. The hand is pale and appears to be in a state of decay, with dark, stringy wires or threads wrapped around the fingers and wrist. The hand is resting on a dark, leafy surface. (Storyline: This cut introduces a horrific and mysterious element, shifting the tone from emotional tension to body horror and suggesting a violent event has occurred.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A faint, wet squishing sound is heard.)
